Lifeism is intrinsically political, but it is also not a political ideology. Lifeism has some fundamental ideas which are non-negotiable in poltical implementations.

* [[right to eternal life]]
* inclusiveness and opposition to bigotry
* Valuing education (often in the [[Lambda Covenant]])

There are multiple interpretations even just by [[kamidere|Immanuelle]]. Much of this comes from the concept of [[impermanence]] and the fact different stages in society have different optimal ways of being run

* [[Sangha Democracy]]
* [[Kamicracy]]
[[Category:Lifeism]]
[[sn:Political Lifeism]][[Category:Politics]]
==See Also==
* [[Economics]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
